message:
Add comprehensive homepage E2E tests (17 tests)

Tests cover:
- Homepage load and title verification
- Hero section display (badge, headline, stats, search, CTA)
- Category filter pills in hero
- Prompt grid display with multiple cards
- Prompt card structure (title, description, badges, buttons)
- Results header with correct count
- Filter sections visibility
- Footer display with site info, social links, and install command
- Responsive layout (mobile and desktop viewports)
- Performance indicators (load time and layout stability)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-7g3","title":"Implement jfp help command (full documentation)","description":"**Details:**
- `jfp help` shows comprehensive documentation
- Organized by category: Listing, Viewing, Copying, Installing, Registry, etc.
- Examples for common workflows
- Links to online documentation
- Pager support for long output

**Output Structure:**
```
USAGE
  jfp <command> [options]

COMMANDS

  Listing & Searching
    list                    List all prompts
    search <query>          Search prompts by query
    suggest <task>          Suggest prompts for a task

  Viewing
    show <id>               Show prompt details
    categories              List all categories
    tags                    List all tags with counts

  Copying & Exporting
    copy <id>               Copy prompt to clipboard
    render <id>             Render prompt with variables
    export <id>             Export as SKILL.md or markdown

  Installing Skills
    install <id>...         Install prompts as skills
    uninstall <id>...       Remove installed skills
    installed               List installed skills
    update                  Update installed skills

  Bundles
    bundles                 List available bundles
    bundle show <id>        Show bundle details

  Registry
    registry status         Show cache status
    registry refresh        Force cache refresh

  Utilities
    open <id>               Open prompt in browser
    doctor                  Check environment
    about                   About this tool
    completion              Generate shell completions

EXAMPLES
  jfp list --category ideation --json
  jfp search 'readme' --limit 5
  jfp install idea-wizard readme-reviser
  jfp render my-prompt --VAR=value

DOCUMENTATION
  https://jeffreysprompts.com/docs
```

**Reasoning:** Comprehensive help is essential for CLI discoverability. Agents and humans both benefit from well-organized documentation.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:34:02.703131871-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T02:41:23.609032273-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T02:41:23.609032273-05:00","close_reason":"Help command already fully implemented with: organized categories, examples, documentation links, pager support, and JSON output for agents.","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-7g3","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-xdt","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:37:43.460016979-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

'jfp render <id> --VAR=value' fills {{VAR}} placeholders. --fill prompts for missing variables interactively. --context <file> appends file content under '---\nContext:\n'. --stdin reads context from stdin.  {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-hmi","title":"Build transcript helper components (InsightCard, MessageContent, TimelineSkeleton)","description":"**Details:**
Three supporting components for the How It Was Made page:

**1. InsightCard (insight-card.tsx)**
- Displays TranscriptHighlight with type-specific styling
- Icons: Brain (key_decision), Lightbulb (interesting_prompt), CheckCircle (clever_solution), AlertTriangle (lesson_learned)
- Color-coded background and border per type
- Shows annotation text

**2. MessageContent (message-content.tsx)**
- Renders markdown-like content with code blocks
- Uses react-syntax-highlighter with oneDark theme
- Splits content on \`\`\` delimiters
- Detects language from fence or content heuristics

**3. TimelineSkeleton (timeline-skeleton.tsx)**
- Loading skeleton for timeline
- Animated pulse effect
- Matches timeline structure (circles + message placeholders)

**Location:** apps/web/src/components/transcript/

**Reasoning:** Supporting components keep TranscriptTimeline and MessageDetail clean. Enables Suspense boundaries with meaningful loading states.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:33:24.934599998-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T16:49:48.421638564-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T16:49:48.421638564-05:00","close_reason":"All helper components implemented: InsightCard, MessageContent, TimelineSkeleton, StatsDashboardSkeleton","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-hmi","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-vsk","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:38:11.094367041-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-hzf","title":"Create root layout with providers (app/layout.tsx)","description":"**Details:**
- Root layout wrapping entire application
- Includes: ThemeProvider, ToastProvider, BasketProvider
- Sets up Geist fonts
- Includes metadata for SEO
- Includes SpotlightSearch (global Cmd+K)

**Implementation:**
```typescript
// apps/web/src/app/layout.tsx
import { Geist, Geist_Mono } from 'next/font/google';
import { ThemeProvider } from '@/components/theme-provider';
import { ToastProvider } from '@/components/toast-provider';
import { BasketProvider } from '@/contexts/basket-context';
import { SpotlightSearch } from '@/components/spotlight-search';
import { Nav } from '@/components/nav';
import { Footer } from '@/components/footer';
import './globals.css';

const geistSans = Geist({ subsets: ['latin'], variable: '--font-geist-sans' });
const geistMono = Geist_Mono({ subsets: ['latin'], variable: '--font-geist-mono' });

export const metadata = {
  title: {
    default: 'Jeffrey\'s Prompts',
    template: '%s | Jeffrey\'s Prompts'
  },
  description: 'Curated prompts for agentic coding. Browse, copy, install as Claude Code skills.',
  metadataBase: new URL('https://jeffreysprompts.com'),
  openGraph: {
    title: 'Jeffrey\'s Prompts',
    description: 'Curated prompts for agentic coding',
    url: 'https://jeffreysprompts.com',
    siteName: 'JeffreysPrompts.com',
    type: 'website',
  },
  twitter: {
    card: 'summary_large_image',
    creator: '@doodlestein',
  },
};

export default function RootLayout({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
  return (
    <html lang='en' suppressHydrationWarning>
      <body className={`${geistSans.variable} ${geistMono.variable} font-sans antialiased`}>
        <ThemeProvider>
          <ToastProvider>
            <BasketProvider>
              <Nav />
              <main className='min-h-screen'>{children}</main>
              <Footer />
              <SpotlightSearch />
            </BasketProvider>
          </ToastProvider>
        </ThemeProvider>
      </body>
    </html>
  );
}
```

**Provider Order (outer to inner):**
1. ThemeProvider (affects all styling)
2. ToastProvider (toasts can appear anywhere)
3. BasketProvider (used by prompts throughout)

**Location:** apps/web/src/app/layout.tsx

**Reasoning:** Root layout establishes the foundation for the entire app. Providers must wrap in correct order for proper functionality.  {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-tco","title":"Set up CLI configuration system (lib/config.ts)","description":"**Details:**
- Configuration file at $HOME/.config/jfp/config.json
- Supports: registry URL, cache settings, skills directories, preferences
- loadConfig() reads with defaults
- saveConfig() persists changes
- Environment variable overrides

**Config Schema:**
```typescript
interface JfpConfig {
  registry: {
    url: string;           // default: https://jeffreysprompts.com
    cacheTtl: number;      // default: 3600 (1 hour)
    autoRefresh: boolean;  // default: true
  };
  skills: {
    personalDir: string;   // default: $HOME/.config/claude/skills
    projectDir: string;    // default: .claude/skills
    preferProject: boolean; // default: false
  };
  output: {
    color: boolean;        // default: true (TTY detection)
    json: boolean;         // default: false
  };
  updates: {
    autoCheck: boolean;    // default: true
    autoUpdate: boolean;   // default: false (opt-in)
  };
}
```

**Implementation:**
```typescript
// packages/cli/src/lib/config.ts

const CONFIG_PATH = join(homedir(), '.config', 'jfp', 'config.json');

const DEFAULT_CONFIG: JfpConfig = {
  registry: {
    url: 'https://jeffreysprompts.com',
    cacheTtl: 3600,
    autoRefresh: true,
  },
  skills: {
    personalDir: join(homedir(), '.config', 'claude', 'skills'),
    projectDir: '.claude/skills',
    preferProject: false,
  },
  output: {
    color: true,
    json: false,
  },
  updates: {
    autoCheck: true,
    autoUpdate: false,
  },
};

export function loadConfig(): JfpConfig {
  try {
    const raw = readFileSync(CONFIG_PATH, 'utf-8');
    return { ...DEFAULT_CONFIG, ...JSON.parse(raw) };
  } catch {
    return DEFAULT_CONFIG;
  }
}

export function saveConfig(config: Partial<JfpConfig>): void {
  const current = loadConfig();
  const merged = { ...current, ...config };
  mkdirSync(dirname(CONFIG_PATH), { recursive: true });
  writeFileSync(CONFIG_PATH, JSON.stringify(merged, null, 2));
}
```

**Environment Overrides:**
- JFP_REGISTRY_URL
- JFP_CACHE_TTL
- JFP_NO_COLOR

**Location:** packages/cli/src/lib/config.ts

**Reasoning:** Configuration system enables customization without modifying code. Environment overrides support CI/CD pipelines and containerized usage.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:36:07.910360593-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T01:31:30.494123526-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T01:31:30.494123526-05:00","close_reason":"Implemented config defaults + env overrides","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-tco","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-xdt","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:37:27.593970446-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-tsj","title":"Implement CLI integration tests (packages/cli/__tests__)","description":"**Details:**
- Test all commands produce expected output
- Test JSON output mode for all commands (agent integration critical)
- Test error handling and exit codes
- Test interactive mode flows
- Test registry caching (mock network)

**Test Categories:**
1. **Output Tests:** Verify human-readable and JSON outputs match expected schemas
2. **Error Tests:** Wrong arguments, missing prompts, network failures
3. **Integration Tests:** Full command flows with mock registry

**Golden Tests (Critical for Agents):**
- `jfp list --json` schema stability
- `jfp search --json` schema stability  
- `jfp show <id> --json` schema stability
- Error payloads: `{ error, code, message }`

**Framework:** Bun test (native)

**Test Organization:**
```
packages/cli/__tests__/
  commands/
    list.test.ts
    search.test.ts
    show.test.ts
    install.test.ts
    ...
  lib/
    registry-loader.test.ts
    config.test.ts
  golden/
    list.golden.json
    search.golden.json
```

**Reasoning:** CLI is agent-facing - JSON schema stability is CRITICAL. Breaking changes break all integrations.  {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-u36","title":"Implement BasketContext and useBasket hook","description":"**Details:**
- React context for managing prompt basket state
- useBasket hook for components to interact with basket
- Persists to localStorage
- Used by PromptCard (add/remove) and BasketSidebar (list/export)

**Implementation:**
```typescript
// apps/web/src/contexts/basket-context.tsx
'use client';

interface BasketContextValue {
  items: string[]; // prompt IDs
  addItem: (id: string) => void;
  removeItem: (id: string) => void;
  clearBasket: () => void;
  isInBasket: (id: string) => boolean;
}

export const BasketContext = createContext<BasketContextValue | null>(null);

export function BasketProvider({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
  const [items, setItems] = useLocalStorage<string[]>('jfp-basket', []);
  
  const addItem = (id: string) => {
    setItems(prev => prev.includes(id) ? prev : [...prev, id]);
  };
  
  const removeItem = (id: string) => {
    setItems(prev => prev.filter(i => i !== id));
  };
  
  const clearBasket = () => setItems([]);
  
  const isInBasket = (id: string) => items.includes(id);
  
  return (
    <BasketContext.Provider value={{ items, addItem, removeItem, clearBasket, isInBasket }}>
      {children}
    </BasketContext.Provider>
  );
}

// apps/web/src/hooks/use-basket.ts
export function useBasket() {
  const context = useContext(BasketContext);
  if (!context) throw new Error('useBasket must be used within BasketProvider');
  return context;
}
```

**Location:**
- apps/web/src/contexts/basket-context.tsx
- apps/web/src/hooks/use-basket.ts

**Reasoning:** Basket state needs to be shared across PromptCard (add button) and BasketSidebar (list/export). Context provides clean state management without prop drilling.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:34:34.599213096-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T01:46:35.527705662-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T01:46:35.527705662-05:00","close_reason":"Added BasketContext provider and useBasket hook (apps/web/src/contexts/basket-context.tsx, apps/web/src/hooks/use-basket.ts)","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-u36","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-rnm","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:37:04.265774025-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
